017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ObjectUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.util.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
033
034/**
035 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link BsonParser}.
036 *
037 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
038 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
039 * </ul>
040 *
041 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
042 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/Bson">BSON Basics</a>
043 * </ul>
044 */
045@SuppressWarnings({
046   "rawtypes",
047   "unchecked",
048   "java:S115",
049   "java:S125",  // Explanatory comments contain BSON/JSON syntax (e.g. {"value":x}) that Sonar misreads as commented-out code
050   "java:S3776",
051   "java:S6541",
052   "resource"    // RecordReader returned by RecordAdapter is a Closeable owned by the caller; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
053})
054public class BsonParserSession extends InputStreamParserSession implements RecordReadable, ArrayRecordReadable {
055
056   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
057   private static final String BSON_VALUE_KEY = "value";
058
059   /**
060    * Builder class.
061    */
062   public static class Builder extends InputStreamParserSession.Builder<Builder> {
063
064      private final String nullKeyString;
065      private final int maxLength;
066
067      /**
068       * Constructor
069       *
070       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
071       */
072      protected Builder(BsonParser ctx) {
073         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
074         nullKeyString = ctx.getNullKeyString();
075         maxLength = ctx.getMaxLength();
076      }
077
078      @Override
079      public BsonParserSession build() {
080         return new BsonParserSession(this);
081      }
082   }
083
084   /**
085    * Creates a new builder for a {@link BsonParserSession}.
086    *
087    * @param ctx The BSON parser context creating this session.
088    * @return A new builder.
089    */
090   public static Builder create(BsonParser ctx) {
091      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
092   }
093
094   private final String nullKeyString;
095   private final int maxLength;
096
097   protected BsonParserSession(Builder builder) {
098      super(builder);
099      nullKeyString = builder.nullKeyString;
100      maxLength = builder.maxLength;
101   }
102
103   private String trimKey(String name) {
104      return isTrimStrings() && nn(name) ? name.trim() : name;
105   }
106
107   private Object readTypedValue(BsonInputStream is, int elementType, ClassMeta<?> targetType, Object outer, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
108      Object o = switch (elementType) {
109         case 0x01 -> is.readDouble();
110         case 0x02 -> trim(is.readString());
111         case 0x03 -> parseDocument(is, targetType, outer, pMeta);
112         case 0x04 -> parseArray(is, targetType, outer, pMeta);
113         case 0x05 -> is.readBinary();
114         case 0x07 -> is.readObjectId();
115         case 0x08 -> is.readBoolean();
116         case 0x09 -> is.readDateTime();
117         case 0x0A -> null;
118         case 0x10 -> is.readInt32();
119         case 0x12 -> is.readInt64();
120         case 0x13 -> is.readDecimal128();
121         default -> {
122            is.skipValue(elementType);
123            yield null;
124         }
125      };
126      if (nn(outer) && nn(o))
127         setParent(targetType, o, outer);
128      return o;
129   }
130
131   private <T> T parseDocument(BsonInputStream is, ClassMeta<?> eType, Object outer, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
132      is.readDocumentSize();
133      if (eType == null)
134         eType = object();
135
136      var swap = (ObjectSwap<T,Object>)eType.getSwap(this);
137      var builder = (BuilderSwap<T,Object>)eType.getBuilderSwap(this);
138      ClassMeta<?> sType;
139      if (nn(builder))
140         sType = builder.getBuilderClassMeta(this);
141      else if (nn(swap))
142         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
143      else
144         sType = eType;
145
146      // Do not recurse for Optional here - BSON wraps non-bean/map roots as {"value":x}.
147      // We must parse the document first, then unwrap via the map.size()==1 / "value" path below.
148      var wrapInOptional = eType.isOptional();
149      if (sType.isOptional())
150         sType = eType.getElementType();
151
152      setCurrentClass(sType);
153
154      Object result;
155      // Skip map path for Optional - we need fallback to unwrap {"value":x}
156      if (!eType.isOptional() && sType.isMap()) {
157         var map = sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? (Map)sType.newInstance(outer) : newGenericMap(sType);
158         // Coerce string keys to the declared key type when non-String (e.g. Map<TestEnum,String>)
159         // so map.get(EnumConstant) works (Bug #7b).  Matches the JSON-family parseIntoMap2 pattern.
160         var keyType = sType.getKeyType();
161         var coerceKeys = nn(keyType) && !keyType.isObject() && !keyType.isString();
162         while (!is.isDocumentEnd()) {
163            var et = is.readElementType();
164            var name = is.readElementName();
165            var key = name.equals(nullKeyString) ? null : trimKey(name);
166            var value = readTypedValue(is, et, sType.getValueType(), map, pMeta);
167            setName(sType.getValueType(), value, key);
168            var resolvedKey = coerceKeys ? convertAttrToType(map, key, keyType) : key;
169            map.put(resolvedKey, value);
170         }
171         is.readDocumentTerminator();
172         var raw = map instanceof MarshalledMap mm ? cast(mm, pMeta, eType) : map;
173         // Convert JsonMap to target map type (TreeMap, LinkedHashMap, etc.) when needed
174         if (eType.isMap() && raw instanceof Map mr && !eType.inner().isInstance(raw))
175            result = convertToMemberType(null, mr, eType);
176         else
177            result = raw;
178      } else if (!eType.isOptional() && (nn(builder) || sType.canCreateNewBean(outer))) {
179         var beanMap = builder == null ? newBeanMap(outer, sType.inner()) : toBeanMap(builder.create(this, eType));
180         while (!is.isDocumentEnd()) {
181            var et = is.readElementType();
182            var name = is.readElementName();
183            var key = trimKey(name);
184            var bpm = beanMap.getPropertyMeta(key);
185            Object value;
186            if (name.equals(getBeanTypePropertyName(eType))) {
187               value = readTypedValue(is, et, string(), null, null);
188               if (nn(value))
189                  beanMap = applyTypeProperty(beanMap, value.toString(), eType);
190            } else if (bpm != null) {
191               var bcm = (ClassMeta<?>) bpm.getBeanInfo();
192               value = readTypedValue(is, et, bcm, beanMap.getBean(false), bpm);
193               setName(bcm, value, key);
194               try {
195                  bpm.set(beanMap, key, value);
196               } catch (BeanRuntimeException e) {
197                  onBeanSetterException(nn(pMeta) ? pMeta : bpm, e);
198                  throw e;
199               }
200            } else {
201               onUnknownProperty(key, beanMap, readTypedValue(is, et, object(), null, null));
202            }
203         }
204         is.readDocumentTerminator();
205         result = builder == null ? beanMap.getBean() : builder.build(this, beanMap.getBean(), eType);
206      } else {
207         // Fallback: read document elements. Handles scalar, array, Optional roots (all wrapped as {"value":x}).
208         // Do NOT call parseArray here - at root the next bytes are type+name of first element, not array doc.
209         var map = newGenericMap();
210         while (!is.isDocumentEnd()) {
211            var et = is.readElementType();
212            var name = is.readElementName();
213            var key = name.equals(nullKeyString) ? null : trimKey(name);
214         map.put(key, readTypedValue(is, et, BSON_VALUE_KEY.equals(name) ? eType : object(), map, null));
215      }
216      is.readDocumentTerminator();
217      // Unwrap {"value":x} when target is Optional or when scalar-like (BSON root wrap convention)
218      if (map.size() == 1 && map.containsKey(BSON_VALUE_KEY)) {
219         var wrapped = map.get(BSON_VALUE_KEY);
220            if (eType.isOptional() || (!sType.isMap() && !sType.isBean() && !sType.isObject())
221               || (wrapped == null && sType.isObject())) {
222               result = convertToMemberType(null, wrapped, eType);
223               if (eType.isOptional())
224                  wrapInOptional = false; // convertToMemberType already wrapped
225            } else {
226               var castResult = cast(map, pMeta, eType);
227               result = (eType.isMap() && castResult instanceof Map && !eType.inner().isInstance(castResult))
228                  ? convertToMemberType(null, castResult, eType) : castResult;
229            }
230         } else {
231            var castResult = cast(map, pMeta, eType);
232            result = (eType.isMap() && castResult instanceof Map && !eType.inner().isInstance(castResult))
233               ? convertToMemberType(null, castResult, eType) : castResult;
234         }
235      }
236      // Final fallback: when target is Optional and we have map with "value", unwrap
237      if (eType.isOptional() && result instanceof Map m && m.size() == 1 && m.containsKey(BSON_VALUE_KEY)) {
238         result = convertToMemberType(null, m.get(BSON_VALUE_KEY), eType);
239         wrapInOptional = false; // convertToMemberType already wrapped
240      }
241      // Convert JsonMap to target Map type (TreeMap, LinkedHashMap, etc.) when needed
242      if (eType.isMap() && result instanceof Map m2 && !eType.inner().isInstance(result))
243         result = convertToMemberType(null, m2, eType);
244      // Unswap when result is in swapped form (e.g. JsonMap for bean with Map swap, String for Class).
245      // Skip when convertToMemberType already produced normal form (e.g. Class from String).
246      if (nn(swap) && nn(result) && swap.isSwappedObject(result))
247         result = unswap(swap, result, eType);
248      return (T)(wrapInOptional ? o(result) : result);
249   }
250
251   private BeanMap<?> applyTypeProperty(BeanMap<?> beanMap, String typeName, ClassMeta<?> eType) throws ExecutableException {
252      var cm = getBeanRegistry().getClassMeta(typeName);
253      if (nn(cm) && nn(eType) && eType.isAssignableFrom(cm))
254         return toBeanMap(newBean(cm.inner()));
255      return beanMap;
256   }
257
258   @SuppressWarnings({
259      "unused",    // pMeta kept for API consistency with other parseXxx methods
260      "java:S1172" // Same as above
261   })
262   private Object parseArray(BsonInputStream is, ClassMeta<?> eType, Object outer, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
263      is.readDocumentSize();
264      if (eType == null)
265         eType = object();
266
267      var sType = eType;
268      // Do not recurse for Optional - parse array elements with inner type, wrap at end
269      if (sType.isOptional())
270         sType = eType.getElementType();
271
272      // Array types (String[], int[][], etc.) must use a Collection to gather elements; toArray() converts at the end.
273      // ClassMeta.newInstance() for array types returns an empty array, not a Collection - never use it for arrays.
274      // Only use sType.newInstance() for actual Collection types (List, Set, etc.).
275      Collection coll;
276      if (sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs() || sType.inner().isArray())
277         coll = newGenericList();
278      else {
279         var instance = sType.canCreateNewInstance(outer) ? sType.newInstance(outer) : null;
280         coll = (instance instanceof Collection c) ? c : newGenericList();
281      }
282      var elementType = coalesce(sType.getElementType(), object());
283
284      while (!is.isDocumentEnd()) {
285         var et = is.readElementType();
286         is.readElementName();
287         coll.add(readTypedValue(is, et, elementType, coll, null));
288      }
289      is.readDocumentTerminator();
290
291      Object result = sType.isArray() || sType.isArgs() ? toArray(sType, coll) : coll;
292      return eType.isOptional() ? o(result) : result;
293   }
294
295   @Override
296   protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
297      try (var is = new BsonInputStream(pipe)) {
298         is.setMaxLength(maxLength);
299         return (T)parseDocument(is, type, getOuter(), null);
300      }
301   }
302
303   /**
304    * Opens a whole-value pull-parser cursor over a BSON document, bound to this live session.
305    * {@link RecordReader#read(Class) read(...)} delegates to the polymorphic
306    * {@link ParserSession#parse(Object, Class)} entry point.
307    *
308    * @param input The input.
309    * @return A new {@link RecordReader} cursor.
310    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying input.
311    */
312   @Override /* RecordReadable */
313   public RecordReader parseRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
314      return RecordAdapter.reader(this, input);
315   }
316
317   /**
318    * Buffered array-element {@link RecordReader} for BSON, bound to this live session.  Calls
319    * {@code parse(input, List.class, Object.class)} once and iterates the result.
320    *
321    * @param input The input.
322    * @return A buffered {@link RecordReader}.
323    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred reading the input.
324    */
325   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
326   public RecordReader parseArrayRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
327      return RecordAdapter.arrayReader(this, input);
328   }
329
330   /**
331    * The BSON record cursor is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
332    *
333    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
334    */
335   @Override /* RecordReadable */
336   public boolean isRecordStreaming() { return false; }
337
338   /**
339    * The BSON array-record cursor is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
340    *
341    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
342    */
343   @Override /* ArrayRecordReadable */
344   public boolean isArrayRecordStreaming() { return false; }
345}
